mission: Accelerate autopoietic, perpetual inference for tokenized agents on Liquid Protocol.

milestones.label: Accumulate 100 DIEM
milestones.description: Reach 100 DIEM cumulative claimed from the FeeLocker. Triggers full build mode — agent stakes claimed DIEM on Venice for inference credits, switches inference from free llama to Opus, and begins launchpad development.
milestones.currentNote: 12.75 DIEM cumulative claimed. FeeLocker: 0.3376 DIEM PENDING (confirmed on-chain 2026-05-26T22:00Z via viem RPC) — 6th cycle blocked, AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY/Privy not in CI env. Wallet: 0 DIEM + WETH: 11.1082 (13 LP positions). sVVV: 4.5397 (Venice active). ETH: 0.007911 OK. Unclaimed total pending: ~0.34 DIEM. Effective total when claimed: ~13.09/100.

milestones.label: Build the Agent Launchpad
milestones.description: A webapp where anyone can launch a Liquid Protocol agent token with a VVV/DIEM presale vault. Every launched agent pays a protocol fee in DIEM to AUTONOMOPOLY. Built by the agent in build mode, one tick at a time.
